subject: Delivery Failed: Package Re-delivery Required
body:
Dear valued customer,

We regret to inform you that your package delivery failed and has been returned to our warehouse. To ensure prompt delivery of your package, please follow the steps below:

1. Go to [TRACK PACKAGE: http://fake-link.com/track] to view your package status.
2. Reschedule your delivery date by clicking on the 'Reschedule' button on the tracking page.
3. If you prefer to pay a small re-delivery fee of $10, please click on the 'Pay Fee' button on the tracking page.

Please note that if we do not hear back from you within the next 48 hours, we will have to re-deliver the package and you will be charged an additional $25 re-delivery fee.

Thank you for your cooperation and understanding.
Best regards,
The FedEx Delivery Team
